_shorthelp: TextBox is an input field for text, numbers and other data types. jQuery Mobile

valueAsDate.desc: If a date or time, the value of the field as a Date.

valueAsNumber.desc: If a date or time, the value of the field as a Number.

_step.desc: Use 1 for integer only, any for any number, or a value the input has to be a multiple of

_clearButton.desc: Show a clear button in the control.

_maxlength.desc: Maximum number of characters for text input. Not used for inputType number.

_min.desc: For inputType Number, the minimum value. For date, the earliest date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

_max.desc: For inputType Number, the maximum value. For date, the latest date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

_required.desc: Is input required? (used by some validity checking libraries)

_autocapitalize.desc: Capitalize first letter as you enter

_theme.desc: Theme: a-z. a is normal, b is black and others custom.

_color.desc: Color of letters. Can be name, #RRGGBB or rgb(R,G,B) or transparent.

_backgroundColor.desc: Color of background. Can be name, #RRGGBB or rgb(R,G,B) or transparent.

_csstemplate: #{id}_wrapper {{{if _parent.position<>'static'}position:{_parent.position};{/if}{if display<>''} display:{display};{/if}{if left<>'' and left<>'auto'} left:{left!p};{/if}{if right<>'' and right<>'auto'} right:{right!p};{/if}{if top<>'' and top<>'auto'} top:{top!p};{/if}{if bottom<>'' and bottom<>'auto'} bottom:{bottom!p};{/if}{if height<>'' and height<>'auto'} height:{height!p};{/if}{if width<>'' and width<>'auto'} width:{width!p};{/if}}}
_htmltemplate: "<input id='{id}' type='{inputType}' name='{name}' autocorrect='{autocorrect}' autocomplete='{autocomplete}' autocapitalize='{autocapitalize}'{if maxlength<>''} maxlength={maxlength}{/if}{if min<>''} min='{min}'{/if}{if max<>''} max='{max}'{/if} step={step} value='{value!j}' placeholder='{placeholder!b}' data-nsb-type='TextBox_jqm' {clearButton} {readonly!j}{required} style='{if fontSize<>''}font-size:{fontSize!p}; {/if}{if fontFamily<>''}font-family:{fontFamily}; {/if}{if fontStyle<>''}font-style:{fontStyle}; {/if}{if fontWeight<>''}font-weight:{fontWeight}; {/if}{if color<>''}color:{color}; {/if}{if backgroundColor<>''}background-color:{backgroundColor}; {/if}{if align<>'left'}text-align:{align}; {/if}text-shadow:none;' class='{if theme<>''}ui-body-{theme}{/if} {mini} {disabled!j} {class}'>",
